title: The Seraphim Enter the Stage
description: On pages 13–15, this part focuses on Rayleigh, Unknown person #13, Unknown person #14, Kid, Unknown person #15, Coby as Blackbeard attacks Amazon Lily, the Seraphim appear, and Rayleigh forces a stalemate around Boa Hancock.
scene: Blackbeard attacks Amazon Lily, the Seraphim appear, and Rayleigh forces a stalemate around Boa Hancock.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: I knew the Navy would lay siege to the island...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: But I didn't think the terrain here would get this devastated.

dialogue.speaker: Rayleigh
dialogue.text: Sorry I'm late, Hancock.

dialogue.speaker: Rayleigh
dialogue.text: D-Dark King Rayleigh?!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Whitebeard's old apprentice, huh... I know it's immature to admit this, but I really don't like you.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: The pirate King's Right Hand Man "Dark King" slivers Ravirigin

dialogue.speaker: Rayleigh
dialogue.text: RAYLEIGH...!!

dialogue.speaker: Rayleigh
dialogue.text: What?! the silvers Rayleigh?!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #13
dialogue.text: What?!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: HANCOCK, release everybody that's been turned to stone.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #13
dialogue.text: I will ensure this de-escalates without issue.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #13
dialogue.text: Then the invaders will leave the island...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #13
dialogue.text: I won't allow any funny business.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #14
dialogue.text: present day

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #14
dialogue.text: I'm so glad...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #14
dialogue.text: ...you managed to survive that.

dialogue.speaker: Rayleigh
dialogue.text: It's thanks to you, Rayleigh.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #14
dialogue.text: Progress sometimes causes new problems...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #14
dialogue.text: Even the calm belt isn't safe anymore...

dialogue.speaker: Kid
dialogue.text: ...with vegapunk's seasons paddleships out there.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Between the Navy's new weapons and Blackbeard's arrival... I thought we were done for-NYO!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #14
dialogue.text: to be frank, we got lucky.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #14
dialogue.text: circum- stances allowed me...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: ...to resolve things with my reputation... I've gotten old.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: I'm pretty certain I wouldn't win a head on fight against blackbeard these days.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: From the sounds of it, the navy are looking...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: ...to replace the seven warlords with those new weapons.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #15
dialogue.text: even after every- thing...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Those two didn't have a single scratch on them!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #15
dialogue.text: It was bizarre...!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #15
dialogue.text: One of them looked just like...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: ...Big SIS DID WHEN SHE WAS A KID!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #15
dialogue.text: Yes. We'll be docking...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #15
dialogue.text: ...at Egghead Port Soon.

dialogue.speaker: Coby
dialogue.text: Regarding the kidnapping of Captain Coby...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: captain Coby, the hero of the Rocky Port incident...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: ...Has been abducted by one of the four emporors, blackbeard!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #15
dialogue.text: His current status is 3 unknown!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #15
dialogue.text: Word spreads across the world!! 🙂

summary: This part advances the Amazon Lily / World Aftermath through 39 cleaned dialogue beats, focusing on character decisions, battlefield momentum, and the story’s larger consequences.
